title: Observation Date
notes: The calendar date of the observation. For monthly data this is the last trading day of the month.

title: Calendar Month Number
notes: The calendar month of the observation date, ranging from 1 (January) to 12 (December).

title: Calendar Quarter Number
notes: The calendar quarter of the observation date, ranging from 1 (January-March) to 4 (October-December).

title: Calendar Year
notes: The four-digit calendar year of the observation date.

title: Company Name
notes: The full display name of the publicly traded company (e.g. 'Uber', 'Upwork').

title: Stock Ticker Symbol
notes: The exchange ticker symbol identifying a publicly traded security (e.g. 'UBER', 'UPWK').

title: GICS Industry Classification Key
notes: The GICS industry-level classification key for the company as returned by Yahoo Finance's stock.info API.

title: GICS Sector Classification Key
notes: The GICS sector-level classification key for the company as returned by Yahoo Finance's stock.info API.

title: Closing Stock Price
notes: The adjusted closing price of the stock on the last trading day of the month, denominated in US dollars.

title: Accumulated Trading Volume
notes: The total number of shares traded during the month.
